name: k8s_autopilot
description: Production-grade multi-agent system for Kubernetes automation. Handles end-to-end Helm chart generation (Planning -> Template -> Validation) and active Cluster Management (Install -> Upgrade -> Rollback) with strict Human-in-the-Loop safety gates.

extensions.description: Provides rich interactive UI components for Kubernetes orchestration workflows including module review, deployment cards, and approval gates.
TalkOps UI extension providing rich metadata for agent discovery, capabilities display, and MCP server information.

metadata.placeholder: Manage Kubernetes clusters, deploy Helm charts, and configure ArgoCD...

capabilityDescription.title: What K8s Autopilot Does
capabilityDescription.description: The K8s Autopilot intelligently manages your Kubernetes clusters. It can generate Helm charts, configure ArgoCD applications, orchestrate Argo Rollouts for progressive delivery, and handle Traefik edge routing.
features: 🎯 Generates production-ready Helm charts from requirements
⚙️ Intelligent cluster management, debugging, and scaling
🔍 Progressive delivery with Argo Rollouts (Canary, Blue/Green)
🧩 GitOps automation using ArgoCD applications and projects

mcpServers.name: Kubernetes MCP Server
mcpServers.description: Provides direct interaction with Kubernetes clusters, allowing the agent to read resources, check logs, and apply manifests.

mcpServers.name: Helm MCP Server
mcpServers.description: Provides interaction with Helm for managing releases, validating charts, and retrieving chart values.

mcpServers.name: ArgoCD MCP Server
mcpServers.description: Provides integration with ArgoCD for creating applications, managing projects, and syncing GitOps state.

mcpServers.name: Argo Rollouts MCP Server
mcpServers.description: Provides integration with Argo Rollouts for managing progressive delivery workflows, canary deployments, and analysis runs.

mcpServers.name: Traefik MCP Server
mcpServers.description: Provides interaction with Traefik edge routing configurations, weighted load balancing, and middlewares.

mcpServers.name: GitHub MCP Server
mcpServers.description: Provides GitHub integration for accessing repositories, committing generated Helm charts, and managing code workflows.

skills.name: Helm Chart Generator
skills.description: Designs and generates production-ready Helm charts from natural language requirements.
examples: Create a high-availability Helm chart for a Node.js app with Redis
Generate a chart for a python worker with cronjobs and secrets

skills.name: GitOps & Progressive Delivery
skills.description: Manages ArgoCD applications, orchestrates Argo Rollouts for canary deployments, and configures Traefik edge routing.
examples: Onboard a new ArgoCD application for my python-worker repo
Promote the canary rollout to 50% traffic weight
Create a Traefik weighted service for blue-green deployment

skills.name: Cluster Operations Manager
skills.description: Manages Kubernetes cluster resources, performs pod debugging, scaling, and general cluster administration.
examples: Find out why the payment-service pod is crashing
List all failed releases in the prod namespace
Scale the frontend deployment to 5 replicas
